message:
feat(conformance): add replay protection conformance vectors

New vector module crates/fcp-conformance/src/vectors/replay.rs with
10 tests covering normative replay protection requirements:

- Handshake nonce: 32-byte requirement, uniqueness verification
- Idempotency key: MAX_IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_LEN (128) enforcement,
  three IdempotencyClass variants (None, BestEffort, Strict),
  Strict required for Risky/Dangerous/Critical operations
- Intent lifecycle: four-state machine (Pending→InProgress→
  Completed|Failed), serialization roundtrip, unique JTI per intent
- Session binding: distinct SessionId generation

Part of [FCP3/P3.5] conformance vectors (bead si48n).
Also adds fcp-webhook dependency to fcp-conformance for future use.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
